title: Write ferrum_extlib_draw.md
description: CCSP lib_ccsp_draw: backend-agnostic 2D drawing with float coords. Not in Ferrum stdlib. Design extlib module: draw backend trait (12 required vtable ops), color model (linear-light storage, OKLab/OKLCh manipulation, sRGB input convenience), paint types (solid, linear gradient, radial gradient, image), path operations, frame lifecycle (begin/end/present), clip regions, transforms.
